description_long: This is a pair of combination pliers featuring robust, metallic jaws and thick, ergonomically designed handles. The jaws are made of steel, with a flat gripping surface and a cutting edge near the pivot, suitable for gripping, twisting, and cutting wires. The handles are coated in a black and yellow rubberized material, providing both insulation and a secure, non-slip grip. The handles display a chevron pattern in yellow, enhancing their visual appeal and grip feedback. The pivot is a single fixed joint, allowing the jaws to open and close smoothly. No visible branding or logo is present on the tool.
description: A sturdy pair of steel pliers with black and yellow rubberized, chevron-patterned handles and flat, cutting jaws.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steel jaws and the full width of the handles with yellow accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the handles, the chevron grip pattern, and the thickness of the jaws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open handles and the yellow inner lining, with the jaws less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chevron grip pattern and the profile of the jaws and handles.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handles with thick rubberized insulation and yellow chevron accents.
attribute_jaw_design: Flat, wide jaws with integrated cutting edge near the pivot; suitable for gripping and cutting wires.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Single fixed pivot joint; does not allow for adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Chevron-patterned, rubberized grip for enhanced tactile feedback and slip resistance.
